caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Is Tampa, Florida, your favorite vacation destination? 

Save this itinerary for fun things to do and places to see during your visit to Tampa, Florida! 

 #thingstodointampa #downtowntampa #tampaflorida #floridavacation #tampavacation

transcription.text: If you're looking for an easy weekend getaway in Tampa, Florida, steal this itinerary. Fly into Tampa International Airport, then drive 20 minutes to check into the J.W. Marriott Tampa Water Street. This hotel is perfectly situated in the center of downtown Tampa and is absolutely beautiful, modern, and luxurious. I highly suggest having a cocktail in the four-story glass lobby bar with lots of comfortable seating overlooking the downtown district. The guest rooms here are modern and well-appointed with water views or city views. I stayed in room 971 and had a view of the pools and the green space, both of which are located on the sixth floor. Here you're going to find cabanas, a variety of conversational seating areas, games, and pool bars. This is a great spot to see the sunset, too. One of my favorite things about the location of this hotel is it's just steps away from the trolley station, which runs every day and is totally free. This is a great way to see the best sights in Tampa without worrying about driving or parking. Check out Sparkman Wharf, which is a modern waterfront area that has hip restaurants, shops, a beer garden, and street food stands. You can walk here or take the trolley from the hotel. Have drinks and appetizers at Beacon, located on the 27th floor of the hotel. This is Tampa's highest cocktail and dining establishment, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the city and waterfront. Send this to someone who needs an easy weekend getaway in Tampa and follow for more great Florida content from a local.
